channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [DEVIT] XDuce Acquires Strategic Stake in Dev Information Technology; Establishes Global Digital Transformation Powerhouse
item.description:
🔥 Trending

XDuce, a US and UK-based technology-led global ecosystem, has acquired a 24% strategic stake in Dev Information Technology Ltd (DEV IT), a global IT services company. This strategic investment aims to accelerate global digital transformation business while preserving the independent operations and identity of both organizations. The alliance will serve as a high-velocity catalyst for global growth, prioritising a robust physical presence and diversified revenue streams. The collaboration brings together complementary strengths of XDuce and DEV IT, enabling enterprises and SMBs to design, build, and deploy modern digital systems faster. The strategic collaboration has been structured to ensure continuity and stability for customers, partners, and employees. Looking ahead, XDuce and DEV IT will jointly focus on high-growth, next-generation digital transformation technologies.

  • XDuce acquires a 24% strategic stake in DEV IT
  • The alliance aims to accelerate global digital transformation business
  • Complementary strengths of XDuce and DEV IT will enable faster design, build, and deployment of modern digital systems
  • The strategic collaboration ensures continuity and stability for stakeholders
  • XDuce and DEV IT will focus on high-growth, next-generation digital transformation technologies

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Dev Information Technology Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [MKTCREAT] Market Creators Ltd Regrets to Inform the Demise of Whole-time Director Mr. Rashmikant Gajendraprasad Acharya
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Market Creators Ltd has announced the demise of its Whole-time Director, Mr. Rashmikant Gajendraprasad Acharya, on 07.03.2026. This is the second such incident in the last four months, causing an unexpected delay in the disclosure. The company expresses deep sympathy and condolences to his family and ensures compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligation and Disclosure Requirements) Regulation, 2015.

  • Market Creators Ltd regrets to inform the demise of Whole-time Director Mr. Rashmikant Gajendraprasad Acharya on 07.03.2026.
  • This is the second demise of a Promoter Director within the last four months, causing an unexpected delay in the disclosure.
  • The company expresses deep sympathy and condolences to his family.
  • The company ensures compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligation and Disclosure Requirements) Regulation, 2015.
  • There was no malafide intention or deliberate delay in making the disclosure; the delay occurred purely due to unforeseen circumstances.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MARKET CREATORS LTD. | Category: Death of Director

item.title: [VBL] Varun Beverages to Acquire Additional 23% Equity Share Capital in Jager Renewables Two Private Limited for Rs. 7.05 Crore
item.description:
🔥 Trending

The Investment and Borrowing Committee of the Board of Directors at Varun Beverages Ltd. approved the acquisition of additional 23% Equity Share Capital of Jager Renewables Two Private Limited. The special purpose vehicle is engaged to generate and supply solar power to consumers in the state of Rajasthan for captive consumption. The total consideration for the acquisition is Rs. 7.05 Crore. Upon completion of the transaction, Varun Beverages Ltd. will hold 49% of the Equity Share Capital of Jager.

  • Varun Beverages Ltd. to acquire 23% additional equity share capital of Jager Renewables Two Private Limited
  • Total consideration for the acquisition is Rs. 7.05 Crore
  • Jager Renewables Two Private Limited is a special purpose vehicle for generating and supplying solar power in Rajasthan
  • Upon completion, Varun Beverages Ltd. will hold 49% of Jager's equity share capital
  • The acquisition is aimed at obtaining solar power for captive consumption and reducing power costs

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Varun Beverages Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [INDIGRID] IndiGrid Infrastructure Trust Completes Acquisition of Gadag Transmission Limited for INR 3720 Million
item.description:
🔥 Trending

IndiGrid Infrastructure Trust has completed the acquisition of 100% paid-up capital and management control of Gadag Transmission Limited (GTL) from ReNew Transmission Ventures Private Limited and KNI India AS. The enterprise value of the transaction is INR 3720 million excluding all adjustments on account of working capital movements. GTL is a Build-Own-Operate-Maintain Inter-State Transmission System project located in Karnataka, with approximately 187 circuit kilometers of transmission lines and 1,500 MVA of transformation capacity. The transaction aligns with IndiGrid’s investment strategy to ensure stable distribution to unitholders by owning assets with long term contracts.

  • IndiGrid Infrastructure Trust has completed the acquisition of Gadag Transmission Limited for INR 3720 million.
  • The acquisition includes 100% paid-up capital and management control of GTL from ReNew Transmission Ventures Private Limited and KNI India AS.
  • GTL is a Build-Own-Operate-Maintain Inter-State Transmission System project located in Karnataka, with approximately 187 circuit kilometers of transmission lines and 1,500 MVA of transformation capacity.
  • The transaction aligns with IndiGrid’s investment strategy to ensure stable distribution to unitholders by owning assets with long term contracts.
  • The acquisition is in line with the Transmission Service Agreement and Definitive Agreement, with necessary governmental, regulatory or any other approvals obtained.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: IndiGrid Infrastructure Trust | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [VBL] Varun Beverages to Acquire Additional 23% Equity Share Capital in Jager Renewables Two Private Limited for Rs. 7.05 Crore
item.description:
🔥 Trending

The Investment and Borrowing Committee of the Board of Directors at Varun Beverages Ltd. approved the acquisition of additional 23% Equity Share Capital of Jager Renewables Two Private Limited. The company plans to obtain solar power for captive consumption for a consideration of Rs. 7.05 Crore. Upon consummation of the transaction, the company will hold 49% of Equity Share Capital of Jager Renewables Two Private Limited. The detailed disclosures for this transaction are enclosed as Annexure — I.

  • Varun Beverages to acquire additional 23% Equity Share Capital of Jager Renewables Two Private Limited
  • Consideration for the acquisition is Rs. 7.05 Crore
  • Jager Renewables Two Private Limited is a special purpose vehicle for generating and supplying solar power
  • Acquisition is for captive consumption to obtain solar power for facilities located in Kota, Alwar, Jaipur, Jodhpur and Bhiwadi in the state of Rajasthan
  • Upon completion of the transaction, Varun Beverages will hold 49% of Equity Share Capital of Jager Renewables Two Private Limited

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Varun Beverages Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [PANACEABIO] Panacea Biotec's Subsidiary Wins Tax Dispute, Reducing Demand by 48%
item.description:
Panacea Biotec Ltd. announces that its wholly owned subsidiary, Panacea Biotec Pharma Ltd. (PBPL), has received an Order dated 10.03.2026 issued by the Deputy Commissioner of State Tax, Maharashtra. The Order resulted from an appeal filed by PBPL in May 2025 against a demand order issued in FY 2024-25, which sought X1.58 Crore in tax, interest, and penalty for alleged excess or ineligible Input Tax Credit and other tax liabilities. The recent Order reduced the total tax demand to X0.81 Crore. PBPL, considering the demand not maintainable, plans to file an appeal with the appellate authority. The Company does not foresee any significant impact on its financial, operational, or other activities.

  • Panacea Biotec's subsidiary, Panacea Biotec Pharma Ltd., receives an Order dated 10.03.2026 from the Deputy Commissioner of State Tax, Maharashtra
  • The Order resulted from an appeal against a X1.58 Crore demand order from FY 2024-25 concerning tax, interest, and penalties
  • The recent Order reduced the total tax demand to X0.81 Crore, a 48% decrease
  • PBPL plans to file an appeal with the appellate authority, considering the demand not maintainable
  • The Company does not anticipate any significant impact on its financial, operational, or other activities

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PANACEA BIOTEC LTD. | Category: Legal

item.title: [GGAUTO] GG Automotive Gears Ltd Receives Unsecured Loan of ₹10 Crores from Chairman & Managing Director
item.description:
🔥 Trending

GG Automotive Gears Ltd has announced that the Board of Directors has approved the acceptance of an unsecured loan from Mr. Kennedy Ramchand Gajra, Chairman & Managing Director (Promoter) of the Company. The loan, amounting to ₹10 Crores, will be infused in one or more tranches on an interest-free basis. The funds will be used for ongoing capital expenditure, meeting working capital requirements, and strengthening the Company’s overall liquidity position. The Company also provided an integrated business and operational update, including the status of the fire incident and insurance claim, promoter commitment, and capacity restoration efforts.

  • GG Automotive Gears Ltd secures ₹10 Crores unsecured loan from Chairman & Managing Director.
  • The loan will be used for ongoing capital expenditure, working capital requirements, and improving liquidity position.
  • Company maintains a strong market position with an executable order book of approximately ₹90 Crores.
  • Fire incident insurance claim process is underway, with the Company working closely with surveyors and insurers.
  • Promoter's ₹10 Crores infusion demonstrates confidence in the Company's long-term resilience and growth prospects.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: G.G.AUTOMOTIVE GEARS LTD. | Category: Investment

item.title: [FRACTAL] Fractal unveils intelligent sales agents to accelerate B2B growth, reducing deal cycles by up to 30%
item.description:
Fractal, a publicly listed global enterprise Al company, launched new intelligent agents within Flyfish.ai, its Al-native revenue acceleration platform. The upgraded platform brings together more than 35 coordinated Al agents that work across the entire sales lifecycle, from researching accounts and identifying buying signals to drafting personalized outreach and maintaining accurate pipelines in real time. Early deployments have shown promising results, including up to 30% faster deal cycles and a 42% increase in sales team productivity.

  • Fractal launched new intelligent agents within Flyfish.ai, its Al-native revenue acceleration platform
  • The upgraded platform brings together more than 35 coordinated Al agents across the sales lifecycle
  • Early deployments have shown promising results, including up to 30% faster deal cycles and a 42% increase in sales team productivity
  • Flyfish.ai is designed to remove the burden of manual research, follow-ups, data entry, and navigating disconnected systems for sales teams
  • Flyfish.ai continuously learns from organizational data and engagement patterns, improving accuracy and effectiveness over time

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: FRACTAL | Category: New Launch

item.title: [CEIGALL] Ceigall India Ltd Emerges as L1 Bidder for Road Construction Contract Worth Rs. 521.00 Crores
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Ceigall India Limited (CIL) jointly with Sushee Infra & Mining Limited (SIML) has emerged as the L1 bidder for the construction of a road from km 0.000 to km 78.38 of Sarli-Huri section of NH-913 (Frontier Highway) to Intermediate Lane on EPC mode in the State of Arunachal Pradesh. The bid cost is Rs. 521.00 Crores and the contract is to be executed within 3 years. The contract was awarded by the Ministry of Road Transport and Highways.

  • Ceigall India Ltd and Sushee Infra & Mining Limited jointly emerged as the L1 bidder
  • The contract is for the construction of a road in Arunachal Pradesh
  • The bid cost is Rs. 521.00 Crores
  • The contract is to be executed within 3 years
  • The contract was awarded by the Ministry of Road Transport and Highways

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Ceigall India Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [KIRLOSIND] Kirloskar Industries Appoints Mrs. Ashwini Mali as Company Secretary of Wholly-Owned Subsidiary Avante Spaces Limited
item.description:
Kirloskar Industries Ltd, a Kirloskar Group Company, has appointed Mrs. Ashwini Mali as the Company Secretary of its Wholly-Owned Subsidiary, Avante Spaces Limited. Mrs. Mali, aged 50, has been associated with the Kirloskar Group since 2006 and has been serving as the Company Secretary of Kirloskar Industries Limited since 2014. She is a commerce graduate, holds a Bachelor of Laws degree, and is an associate member of The Institute of the Company Secretaries of India. She has significant experience in corporate secretarial practices, corporate governance, and regulatory compliance. Mrs. Mali also holds directorships in Binaza Consult Private Limited, Kirloskar Solar Technologies Private Limited, and Paragon Greensutra Private Limited.

  • Kirloskar Industries Ltd appoints Mrs. Ashwini Mali as Company Secretary of Avante Spaces Limited
  • Mrs. Mali has been associated with the Kirloskar Group since 2006
  • She holds a Bachelor of Laws degree and is an associate member of The Institute of the Company Secretaries of India
  • Mrs. Mali has significant experience in corporate secretarial practices, corporate governance, and regulatory compliance
  • She also holds directorships in Binaza Consult Private Limited, Kirloskar Solar Technologies Private Limited, and Paragon Greensutra Private Limited

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Kirloskar Industries Ltd | Category: Board Meeting
